title: Betta Click Sound
description: Changes the default click sound to a much better and more satisfying one.
body:
![discord invite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09108583b09003db53686d96914c292c10465f6a.png)
### ⭐ [https://discord.gg/yZhPvUQu4H](https://discord.gg/yZhPvUQu4H) ⭐
Join my Discord server im lonlee 🥺

## <big>Betta Click Sound

Are you a bit sick of the default click sound of Minecraft? do you want something new?
**well look no further!**

this resource pack changes *only* the click sound and nothing else.
the click sound sounds like the classic click of a mouse.

i feel like this was much-needed, **enjoy!**

I HIGHLY reccomend using Kinetic Hosting if you want to make a minecraft server, give it a try!
![Kinetic hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b11a82383293cdb829d4e1eb1aab75aa2bbf4f.png)
https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=830
